case_title: STEIN, RICHARD B. DBA CITY PARKING COMPANY VS GANZ, JERRY C/O FIRST CALIFORNIA INVESTMENTS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY STEIN, RICHARD B. DBA CITY PARKING COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT GANZ, JERRY  C/O FIRST CALIFORNIA INVESTMENTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
